programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A man collapses at the Harts restaurant table and asks them to protect the man with jade eyes and take him to the temple

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: When a captured burglar swears he never uses a gun it sends Cagney and Lacey to figure out how a shooting also occurred at the scene of the crime Dory finally feels its time for Christine to meet his children

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch make time to help an old friend just back in town locate his ex-wife and son while also attempting to uncover the identity of a hitman hired to assassinate a secret witness in a drug kingpins trial

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Leading aircraft designer Robert Phelps is abducted by foreign agents to the horror of his mentally challenged son Bobby Hawke decides to try and find Phelps obtaining leads from Bobby whose autism gives him the ability to draw detailed clues from memory While in the agents custody Phelps has a sudden heart-attack and is rendered useless to them Hawke has to find him for Bobby

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two young antique store owners must recover cursed antiques

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas but theres trouble brewing within the crews ranks Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders whats up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lous big secret Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold digging RO out on a date but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Addams 224
programme.desc: Addams 224

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After breaking a date with Tommy Hassie takes things out on her family

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa begins neglecting Flora MacMichael when an attractive 50-year-old widow develops an interest in him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark goes missing during a hunting trip Lucas tries to get help to look for his missing son Before he gets very far both Lucas and Mark are taken hostage by Skull Ranch - a haven for outlaws

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark take in a young woman and her brother after the brother comes down with measles But rumors are flying around that the young woman is a princess - not merely a woman whos yearning to be a farmer

programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An informant known as Black Ten turns Friday and Gannon onto a known burglar who is trying to sell an expensive ring that had been reported as stolen They enlist the aid of a policewoman just out of the academy to help them undercover

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon work the hospital round They are called to talk to a mentally-challenged man who threatens to blow up a radio station

programme.desc: Young man on the brink of success is about to marry the woman of his dreams However his past comes calling

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to No More Mr Nice Guy the twin daughters of the cop who killed Freddy find that whenever one is attacked by the man of their dreams the other is wounded So the sisters team up to try to get Freddy out of their dreams for good

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate wants to discipline Hassie and Little Luke for bad grades and skipping school but Grandpa thinks she is being too tough So Kate lets Grandpa takes over raising the kids

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Smart 516
programme.desc: Smart 516

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans 313

programme.title: Mchale 235

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Faded singer Ginny Gordons comeback is threatened and her sanity imperiled by attempts on her life Is her former partner responsible for the attempts or is a recent acquaintance terrorizing her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Scalped stolen opera tickets land Jonathan in the middle of a plot to assassinate the DA who is fighting organized crime

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry announces that he plans to marry Stephanie despite the fact that shes dating Michael

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George enlists Dick to help roast him at his Man of the Year ceremony for the Beavers but gets upset when Dicks jokes hit too close to home

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan discovers an underground source of hot water on the island but The Professor soon learns that the source of the hot water is an active volcano on the other side of the island

programme.title: Baywath Nights
programme.desc: Investigating strange events at a nearby campsite Mitch and Ryan enter a cabin and find themselves transported back in time to a 1890s brothel in New York with an axknife wielding killer planning to murder everyone involved

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees Then Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior Finally the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck but at what cost does revenge come

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison Matt is on the warpath and somebody needs to pay Is this just the end of their business or is it also the end of their friendship Then Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession Theres only one problem it belongs to somebody who is like family to them

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke help family friend Mary Kaye Porter elude a crime boss whos after the 100000 trust fund for Mary Kayes unborn child

programme.title: Hercules 221
programme.desc: Hercules 221

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone helps prevents a suicide of a handless girl Daan wants to use revolutionary Taelon technology to help the girl for propaganda reasons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Arcane combines his DNA with that of the deadliest plants he can find he unwittingly creates a monster

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Life gets very interesting for Will Tressa and Alec when Brads psychopathic brother turns up

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody enlists the help of self-proclaimed preacher Gideon Poole but regrets it when he learns the truth about him

programme.desc: Stone pursues a killer who shot an officer about to retire in three days; guests Tim OConnor Eileen Heckart

programme.desc: Any world-class MMA fighter is fearless. Then there’s Nick Agallar who spent 16 months serving his country in Iraq. His opponent Debrah is lightning fast, dishes out lethal strikes and got a few grappling lessons from the Gracie clan along the way.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

Zach Manywounds vs. Andrew Vandervelden; Jeff Porter vs. Dan Walders; Dia Grant vs. Michael Karkula; Corey Atkinson vs. Denny Heathen.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK travels to Africa to stop a botched experiment which has created a deadly blue slime consuming everything in its path VENOM learns of the slime and seeks to control it in order to take the world hostage
